description_long: This is a DeWalt cordless electric drill, featuring a robust yellow and black plastic exterior with ergonomic rubberized grip for comfortable handling. The drill has a prominent cylindrical chuck at the front for holding drill bits, and a visible trigger button integrated into the handle. The base of the handle houses a detachable 20V lithium-ion battery pack, which is clearly labeled and slightly worn from use. Ventilation slots are present on the side of the main body to prevent overheating during operation. The drill's surface shows signs of wear, indicating it is a well-used tool, and the DeWalt brand logo is prominently displayed on both the body and battery.
description: A yellow and black DeWalt cordless electric drill with a rubberized grip, visible trigger, and a detachable 20V battery pack.
description_view_0: The right side of the drill shows the DeWalt logo, ergonomic grip, and the battery pack with clear branding.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the back of the handle and battery pack, with minimal detail visible on the drill body.
description_view_2: The left side displays the battery label, ventilation slots, and additional product information stickers.
description_view_3: The front view focuses on the drill chuck, showing the opening for drill bits and the end of the battery pack.
